Shuban Pal
Home Blog

Hi, I’m Shuban

I’m an incoming first-year at the Georgia Institute of Technology majoring in computer science. I build systems and technical projects centered around robotics, computer vision, and low-level computing.

In my free time, I participate in various cs/engineering competitions particularly in fields like cybersecurity and robotics. That said, most of my writeups on this website cover CTFs, “Capture The Flag” style cybersecurity competitions, I participate in with my team Cosmic Bit Flip.

Some of my hobbies include taking long walks with no real destination, studying math and physics without the stress of a grade, and improving my cooking skills.
